prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on the Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model. Historical daily adjusted closing prices for AVGO over the last year were used to estimate the annualized drift (average log return) and annualized volatility. The point estimate represents the expected price in 20 days. The confidence intervals are derived from the log-normal distribution properties of prices under the GBM model, using the estimated drift and volatility. A positive annualized drift of 19.71% and an annualized volatility of 24.27% were calculated from the historical data.
